title: Luffy Blocks Crocodile
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on luffy blocks crocodile, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Luffy Blocks Crocodile. Luffy stays behind to fight Crocodile for the first time, learning the terrifying gap between resolve and a Warlord’s power. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: "Shitty Restaurant...!?"

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh? Judging by that tone of voice, you still remember me too!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm touched, really...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hello, this is the shitty restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't play around, you imbecile.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Dender- mushi? What are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've never used the Dender- mushi even once while I was on Little Garden.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The 4 members of the straw- hat: Pirates should all be locked inside that cage right now...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Could there have possibly been another member...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Did you hear that voice just now...?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The "shitty restaurant"...!? Could it be...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: SAN-

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No wait, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Baroque Works might not know about him yet...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sanji... that's right! Both Sanji and Chopper are still outside!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Just who the hell are you...!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Me? Well...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Call me, "Mr. Prince."

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well, Mr. Prince... Where are you right now?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh, I can't tell you that.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: If I did, you'd come to kill me, wouldn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: And setting aside the matter of whether or not you could even kill me,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Unlike you, Mr. 0, I'm not so stupid enough as to give away so much vital information...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: PRINCE! Help us!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We've been caught and we don't have much time left!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Help! Help!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Haha...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Guess my crew's over there.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Well, then I should head ov-

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: thwack!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: CLICK! Hah... Hah... Tough son of a gun...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Hello!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I've apprehended a weird male attacker!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Hah... Hah...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Samjill?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Where are you right now?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Tell me your location.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I'm, uhh... Right outside the front entrance of the Rain Pimmers Casino...

summary: This part develops luffy blocks crocodile and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
